templates.name: Weather by IPMA HTTP
templates.description:
Weather monitoring for Portugal via IPMA (Instituto Português do Mar e da Atmosfera) public Open Data API.
Provides 5-day daily forecasts and active weather warnings (next 3 days).

No agent required — uses HTTP agent items.

Setup:
1. Locate the area at https://api.ipma.pt/open-data/distrits-islands.json and copy 'globalIdLocal' → {$IPMA.LOCATION.ID}
2. Copy 'idAreaAviso' → {$IPMA.WARNING.AREA.ID}
3. (Optional) Tune {$IPMA.RAIN.PROB.WARN}, {$IPMA.TEMP.MAX.HIGH}, {$IPMA.TEMP.MIN.LOW}, {$IPMA.WIND.STRONG}, {$IPMA.WIND.VERY.STRONG}

Data sources:
- Forecast: https://api.ipma.pt/open-data/forecast/meteorology/cities/daily/{globalIdLocal}.json
- Warnings: https://api.ipma.pt/open-data/forecast/warnings/warnings_www.json
- Weather type IDs: https://api.ipma.pt/open-data/weather-type-classe.json
- Wind speed classes: https://api.ipma.pt/open-data/wind-speed-daily-classe.json

items.name: Forecast: get raw
items.description: Master item: 5-day daily forecast JSON for {$IPMA.LOCATION.ID}. Not stored — dependent items extract individual metrics. The '$.data' array is forwarded so prototypes only deal with the forecast objects.

triggers.name: IPMA forecast: no data for {$IPMA.FORECAST.NODATA}
triggers.description: The IPMA forecast endpoint has not returned data within {$IPMA.FORECAST.NODATA}. The API may be unreachable or the configured location ID is invalid.

items.name: Forecast today: rain probability
items.description: Precipitation probability for today as a percentage (0–100%).

items.name: Forecast today: raw
items.description: Internal helper: extracts the soonest forecast object (data[0]) from the master 5-day array. IPMA orders the array chronologically with today (or, on day-of-publication boundary, tomorrow) first, so this is the best 'right now' snapshot without timezone or date-format edge cases. Not stored — dependent items extract individual metrics.

parameters:
var arr = JSON.parse(value);
return (Array.isArray(arr) && arr.length > 0) ? JSON.stringify(arr[0]) : '{}';

items.name: Forecast today: temperature, max
items.description: Maximum temperature forecast for today in degrees Celsius.

triggers.name: Today: temperature max. above {$IPMA.TEMP.MAX.HIGH}°C
triggers.description: Maximum temperature for today exceeds {$IPMA.TEMP.MAX.HIGH}°C — extreme heat warning.

items.name: Forecast today: temperature, min
items.description: Minimum temperature forecast for today in degrees Celsius.

triggers.name: Today: temperature min. below {$IPMA.TEMP.MIN.LOW}°C
triggers.description: Minimum temperature for today is below {$IPMA.TEMP.MIN.LOW}°C — frost/freeze warning.

items.name: Forecast today: weather type
items.description: IPMA weather type ID for today (0–30). Rendered via the 'IPMA weather type' value map.

items.name: Forecast today: wind direction
items.description: Predominant wind direction for today as a compass abbreviation (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW).

items.name: Forecast today: wind speed class
items.description: IPMA daily wind speed class for today (1=Weak, 2=Moderate, 3=Strong, 4=Very strong). Rendered via the 'IPMA wind speed class' value map.

triggers.name: Today: wind is strong (or stronger)
triggers.description: IPMA wind speed class for today is at or above {$IPMA.WIND.STRONG} (Strong).

triggers.name: Today: wind is very strong
triggers.description: IPMA wind speed class for today is at or above {$IPMA.WIND.VERY.STRONG} (Very strong) — take precautions for outdoor structures and equipment.

items.name: Warnings: get raw
items.description: Master item: weather warnings JSON for the next 3 days (all areas). The discovery filter restricts items to {$IPMA.WARNING.AREA.ID}.

triggers.name: IPMA warnings: no data for {$IPMA.WARNING.NODATA}
triggers.description: The IPMA warnings endpoint has not returned data within {$IPMA.WARNING.NODATA}. The API may be unreachable.

items.name: Warnings: active count
items.description: Count of warning categories currently at yellow or above (awareness >= 1) within the configured area. Returns 0 when no warning items have been discovered yet.

items.name: Warnings: max awareness level
items.description: Maximum awareness level (0=green, 3=red) across every discovered warning category in the configured area. Returns 0 when no warning items have been discovered yet.

discovery_rules.name: Forecast discovery
discovery_rules.description: Discovers forecast dates from the IPMA 5-day forecast response. Creates per-day items for temperature (min/max), rain probability, weather type, wind speed and direction.

item_prototypes.name: Forecast {#DATE}: rain probability
item_prototypes.description: Precipitation probability for {#DATE} as a percentage (0–100%).

item_prototypes.name: Forecast {#DATE}: temperature, max
item_prototypes.description: Maximum temperature forecast for {#DATE} in degrees Celsius.

item_prototypes.name: Forecast {#DATE}: temperature, min
item_prototypes.description: Minimum temperature forecast for {#DATE} in degrees Celsius.

item_prototypes.name: Forecast {#DATE}: weather type
item_prototypes.description: IPMA weather type ID for {#DATE} (0–30). Rendered via the 'IPMA weather type' value map (e.g. Clear sky, Partly cloudy, Showers/rain, Thunderstorms).

item_prototypes.name: Forecast {#DATE}: wind direction
item_prototypes.description: Predominant wind direction for {#DATE} as a compass abbreviation (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW).

item_prototypes.name: Forecast {#DATE}: wind speed class
item_prototypes.description: IPMA daily wind speed class for {#DATE} (1=Weak, 2=Moderate, 3=Strong, 4=Very strong). Rendered via the 'IPMA wind speed class' value map.

discovery_rules.name: Warning discovery
discovery_rules.description: Discovers active weather warning categories for {$IPMA.WARNING.AREA.ID} from the IPMA warnings response. Creates per-category items for awareness level, validity window and warning text.

item_prototypes.name: Warning {#WARNING.TYPE}: awareness level
item_prototypes.description: Awareness level for {#WARNING.TYPE} warnings: 0=green (no warning), 1=yellow, 2=orange, 3=red. Rendered via the 'IPMA awareness level' value map.

item_prototypes.name: Warning {#WARNING.TYPE}: end time
item_prototypes.description: End of the {#WARNING.TYPE} warning validity window (UTC, displayed in local time by Zabbix).

item_prototypes.name: Warning {#WARNING.TYPE}: start time
item_prototypes.description: Start of the {#WARNING.TYPE} warning validity window (UTC, displayed in local time by Zabbix).

item_prototypes.name: Warning {#WARNING.TYPE}: text
item_prototypes.description: Description text issued by IPMA for the {#WARNING.TYPE} warning (Portuguese).

trigger_prototypes.expression: last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.awareness[{#WARNING.TYPE}])>=2 and last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.starttime[{#WARNING.TYPE}])<=now() and last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.endtime[{#WARNING.TYPE}])>=now()
trigger_prototypes.name: Warning {#WARNING.TYPE} active: orange
trigger_prototypes.description: IPMA has issued an ORANGE warning for {#WARNING.TYPE} that is currently within its validity window. Moderate to high severity.

dependencies.name: Warning {#WARNING.TYPE} active: red
dependencies.expression: last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.awareness[{#WARNING.TYPE}])>=3 and last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.starttime[{#WARNING.TYPE}])<=now() and last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.endtime[{#WARNING.TYPE}])>=now()

trigger_prototypes.expression: last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.awareness[{#WARNING.TYPE}])>=3 and last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.starttime[{#WARNING.TYPE}])<=now() and last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.endtime[{#WARNING.TYPE}])>=now()
trigger_prototypes.name: Warning {#WARNING.TYPE} active: red
trigger_prototypes.description: IPMA has issued a RED warning for {#WARNING.TYPE} that is currently within its validity window. Highest severity — take immediate precautions.

trigger_prototypes.expression: last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.awareness[{#WARNING.TYPE}])>=1 and last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.starttime[{#WARNING.TYPE}])<=now() and last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.endtime[{#WARNING.TYPE}])>=now()
trigger_prototypes.name: Warning {#WARNING.TYPE} active: yellow
trigger_prototypes.description: IPMA has issued a YELLOW warning for {#WARNING.TYPE} that is currently within its validity window. Low to moderate severity.

dependencies.name: Warning {#WARNING.TYPE} active: orange
dependencies.expression: last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.awareness[{#WARNING.TYPE}])>=2 and last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.starttime[{#WARNING.TYPE}])<=now() and last(/Weather by IPMA HTTP/ipma.warning.endtime[{#WARNING.TYPE}])>=now()

macros.description: Polling interval for the IPMA forecast endpoint. IPMA publishes daily forecasts ~2x/day, so 30m is a sensible default; lower wastes calls.
No-data threshold for the IPMA forecast master item. Should be >= 2x {$IPMA.FORECAST.INTERVAL} to absorb transient API failures.
IPMA 'globalIdLocal' for the area whose forecast you want. Look it up in https://api.ipma.pt/open-data/distrits-islands.json (default 1110600 = Lisboa).
Rain probability threshold (%). Triggers an INFO alert per forecast day exceeding this value.
Maximum-temperature alert threshold (°C). Triggers an AVERAGE alert per forecast day above this value.
Minimum-temperature alert threshold (°C). Triggers an AVERAGE alert per forecast day below this value.
IPMA 'idAreaAviso' for the warning area to filter (e.g. LSB, PTG, FAR). Look it up in https://api.ipma.pt/open-data/distrits-islands.json (default LSB = Lisboa).
Polling interval for the IPMA warnings endpoint. Warnings can be issued or revised at any time, so polling more frequently than forecasts is appropriate.
No-data threshold for the IPMA warnings master item. Should be >= 2x {$IPMA.WARNING.INTERVAL}.
Wind speed class threshold for the WARNING-severity 'strong wind' trigger (1=Weak, 2=Moderate, 3=Strong, 4=Very strong).
Wind speed class threshold for the AVERAGE-severity 'very strong wind' trigger (1=Weak, 2=Moderate, 3=Strong, 4=Very strong).
